name: Seafood Bisque
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 pint (750 ml) Chicken or fish stock
8 ounces (240 g) Assorted cooked seafood such as prawns, crab, mussels, and scallops
Salt and freshly ground Black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add the sliced onions and cook gently for 3 minutes.
2. Add the chopped tomatoes, crushed garlic, peppercorns, and chopped herbs (oregano, basil, parsley). Cook gently for 10 minutes or until the tomatoes are soft.
3. Remove half of the chicken or fish stock and stir it into the tomato mixture. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer gently for 15 minutes.
4. Strain the soup through a fine sieve using the back of a wooden spoon to press on the vegetables. Discard the solids and return the liquid to a clean saucepan.
5. Add the remaining stock, tomato puree, pasta shells, assorted seafood (prawns, crab, mussels, scallops), and dry sherry. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes or until the pasta is cooked through.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Ladle the soup into warm bowls. Stir in a teaspoon of single cream into each serving. Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
Preparation time: 15 minutes
Cooking time: 45 minutes
Freezing recommended after step 4
